question: What is the name of the Compliance Officer at XYZ Corporation?
answer_paragraph: XZY Corporation's code of conduct is overseen by our Compliance Officer, Jane Doe. If you have any questions or concerns, please do not hesitate to contact her at jane.doe@xyzcorp.com or 555-1234.
